title: Furby Furblets Groo-Vee Mini Electronic Plush Toy, Purple and Blue
features: 45+ ELECTRONICA STYLE SOUNDS: Groo-Vee is a musical plush toy who plays cool electro tunes and says funny phrases in Furbish, the classic Furby language. Includes 3 x A76/LR44 button cell demo batteries

3 WAYS TO ACTIVATE SOUNDS: Press this cuddly electronic plush toy's beak for feeding noises and tap the heart gem for music. The talking plush toy's top of the head activates Furbish phrases and is also the on-off switch

KEYCHAIN CLIP FOR ON THE GO: The 5 cm/2 inch small plush toy for 6+ year old girls and boys has a removable keychain clip for backpacks or other bags, so that the Furby may be comfortable during travel. Surface clean only
PEEKABOO EARS POP OPEN: Fold one or both ears down and press the head to make them pop back up. This interactive plush toy can generate hours of play!
HARMONISE WITH OTHER FURBLETS (SOLD SEPARATELY): Groo-Vee's Furby friends come in different colours and music style personalities. Collect more plush toys with sounds and they'll sing together

FURBLE TALK: If you have one of the latest collectible electronic plush toys for 6+ year old children from 2023, activate Furdar mode to see what your Furby has to say about their little friends (sold separately)
description: From the manufacturer Kah Loo-Lay Ee-Kah-Lee-Koo (I Play Music) Press the heart gem to hear Groo-Vee play their own unique rock ‘n roll style tunes. Kah Noo-Noo Furbish (I Speak Furbish) These little friends only know how to speak Furbish - press their head to hear phrases. Ah-Tah Kah (Feed Me!) Feed with your finger by pressing the mouth to hear funny eating sounds. Nom nom nom! Wee-Tee (Sing) with Noo-Lahs (Friends) Press and hold their mouths at the same time to make multiple Furblets sing together. Kah Bye-Bye Oo-Nye (I Go With You) Attach the Furblet to your bag or backpack with the clip to take on the go. Kah Way-Loh (I Sleep) Groo-Vee will go to sleep after 1 minute of no interaction or when you press and hold their head.
